sources_exist.note: All 11 URL occurrences resolved to accessible pages.

figures_match_sources.note: Aventis supports 5.0x and 11.2x implied size-based benchmarks, McKinsey supports the national owner-age frame, MedhaCloud states the 74%/62% MRR series, and Kaseya's press release supports the AI-use figures. However, the exact Kaseya report landing page does not expose those figures, the active-platform page names seven rather than establishing 20, the historical-analog page does not establish 8-10 years to majority RMM/PSA penetration, and the ConnectWise page does not support the quoted 74% MRR or 22%-versus-8% margin figures.

judgment_inputs_plausible.note: The bounded role fractions and capture/moat values are directionally plausible for an MSP, but the record applies MSP business-model evidence to a broader 541512 frame, infers 39.41% of wages in one unobserved tail, and sets t50=2 from a vendor-selected global survey without a sourced historical diffusion rate. These frame and evidence gaps are large enough to affect V, C, and A.

rubric_consistent.note: Dataset inputs match exactly and formula structure follows the prompt. The PRESSURED terminal class is coherent. But B uses an unsupported 20-platform count, A uses an unsupported analog, and C relies on pricing shares not supported by the cited primary page, so the rubric inputs are not consistently evidenced.

cross_checks_honest.note: Uplift and no-proxy checks are candid, and pricing-model deflation recognizes seat-count and upstream-vendor capture. The terminal check overstates the evidence by asserting cyber-insurance/compliance requirements name an accountable provider and that platform vendors depend on rather than compete with the MSP channel; the cited sources show channel delivery but do not establish those deciding mechanisms or their revenue share.

source_audits.note: The page supports 169 tracked 2025 MSP deals, 69% PE involvement, Evergreen's 47 acquisitions, and seven named active roll-up platforms. It does not enumerate or otherwise establish the declared count of 20 active PE-backed platforms.

Aventis states that under-$5M deal values average about 5.0x EV/EBITDA and explains the applied size discount, directly supporting buy_mult=5.0, though this is an interpolated benchmark rather than a median of disclosed small-MSP transactions.

The landing page confirms more than 1,000 MSP respondents and describes AI/automation topics, but its accessible content does not show the quoted 53%, 80%, 13%, or quarter-of-workload figures used to derive 45% material adoption.

Aventis explains an 11.2x reference based on medians for 10 listed MSPs and applies it to $500M-plus transactions, directly supporting the stated 11.2x scale benchmark, with the important limitation that it is public-comparable/interpolated rather than a $10M-EBITDA private-platform transaction median.

The secondary compilation states recurring revenue rose from 62% in 2020 to 74% in 2025, but it does not establish the record's claimed 8-10 years from early RMM/PSA availability to majority penetration. The cited statistic is a revenue-mix shift, not a technology-adoption timeline.

McKinsey reports more than half of U.S. small-business owners are over 55 and one in four are 65 or older. It supports the national baseline, while the 30% MSP-specific 60-plus value remains explicitly labeled ESTIMATE rather than directly measured.
The page states a 74% MRR share, 14% project work, 8% hardware/resale, and 4% break-fix, supporting the capture-positive recurring mix used in pi_dist, albeit as a secondary compilation.

ConnectWise reports MSP adjusted EBITDA of 11.1% in Q4 2024 and project-services gross margin falling from 23% to 12.9%, supporting project-channel pressure. It does not report the separate 74% MRR share asserted in the combined rationale.

Channel Dive documents Kaseya's agentic platform autonomously triaging tickets, containing threats, verifying backups, and optimizing workflows through tools embedded for MSP subscribers, supporting both automation and upstream-platform capture/disintermediation risk.

Kaseya reports 53% using AI in ticketing, patching, and monitoring, 13% generating meaningful AI-service revenue, and cybersecurity as the strongest revenue-growth category. This supports the current operational and cyber anchors, though not the claimed insurance/attestation requirement.

The page supports project gross margin falling from 23% to 12.9% and average MSP adjusted EBITDA at 11.1%, but it does not contain the quoted 74%-versus-62% recurring-revenue series or top-quartile 22%-versus-median-8% operating-margin comparison.

reasons: Substantiate inputs.active_consolidators.value with a documented enumeration of at least 20 qualifying active PE-backed MSP platforms; https://ctacquisitions.com/guides/private-equity-msp-2026/ names seven and does not support the declared count.

Use a directly accessible source for inputs.current_adoption_pct.figure_quoted and inputs.t50_years; the exact https://www.kaseya.com/resource/2026-kaseya-state-of-the-msp-report-insights/ landing page does not expose the claimed percentages, and the 45% NAICS-wide discount needs a reproducible basis.

Replace or correct inputs.historical_analogs so its cited source actually supports an RMM/PSA time-to-majority adoption curve; https://medhacloud.com/blog/managed-services-market-statistics-2026 only reports a recurring-revenue mix change.

Correct inputs.pricing_structure.figure_quoted and its evidence chain; https://www.connectwise.com/company/press/releases/service-leadership-index-q4-data supports the project-margin decline but not the claimed 74% MRR share or 22%-versus-8% margin comparison.

Re-run the MSP-to-NAICS mapping with evidence for the share of 541512 target firms that follow the MSP model and for the 39.41% unallocated wage-tail composition, then revisit inputs.ai_replaceable_share, inputs.pi_dist, and inputs.t50_years.

Revise cross_checks.terminal_value to source the claimed cyber-insurance/compliance accountability requirement and vendor channel-dependence mechanism, or present them explicitly as unresolved scenarios rather than current evidence.
